blocking_issues: Free-form String inline phrases such as '问纳博特 {prompt}' fail real App Shortcuts metadata validation; v1 currently supports only the follow-up Siri phrase.
A physical iPhone Siri run is still pending; current verification now covers simulator build, simulator unit tests, and simulator UI smoke, but not on-device voice invocation.
No non-simulator iPhone destination is visible in `xcrun xcdevice list`, so end-to-end Siri speech acceptance cannot be completed on this machine yet.
